_comment: Broodforge documentation manifest. Edit this file to register new docs or change generation flags. Run proxmox-bootstrap/regenerate_docs.py to rebuild all HTML from source.

docs.title: Broodforge README
docs.description: Primary overview of the broodforge project — architecture, processes, and design constraints.

docs.title: Broodforge Architecture
docs.description: Architecture decision records (ADs) and system design rationale.

docs.title: Broodforge Roadmap
docs.description: Full development roadmap with phase milestones and status.

docs.title: PHOENIX — Stargate Process
docs.description: Operator runbook for the stargate process — rebuilds a failed node on new hardware.

docs.title: FORGING — Hatchery Build
docs.description: Operator runbook for forging the first broodforge hatchery node from bare hardware.

docs.title: NODE-SPAWNING — Hatchery Process
docs.description: Operator runbook for spawning a new broodling node into an existing hatchery.

docs.title: Reconstruction Drill
docs.description: Guided drill for testing recovery readiness — validates the full stargate process end-to-end.

docs.title: Cloud Storage Setup
docs.description: Step-by-step setup guides for Backblaze B2, AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Google Drive, and MinIO backup destinations.

docs.title: Cloudflare Setup
docs.description: Cloudflare DNS and DDNS configuration for the broodforge hatchery.

docs.title: DuckDNS Setup
docs.description: DuckDNS DDNS and Let's Encrypt TLS certificate setup for operators without their own domain.

docs.title: Snippet Upload
docs.description: How to upload and manage Cloud-Init snippets in the Proxmox snippet store.

docs.title: Tier 2 State Collection
docs.description: Runbook for SSH-based Tier 2 state collection from cluster nodes.

docs.title: User Registry
docs.description: User lifecycle management — onboarding, offboarding, and service adapter conventions.

docs.title: Talos Alternative
docs.description: Evaluation of Talos Linux as an alternative k8s substrate to k3s.

docs.title: Feature History
docs.description: Chronological log of significant feature additions to the broodforge platform.

docs.title: Design History
docs.description: Historical record of key design decisions and architecture evolution.

docs.title: Audit Findings
docs.description: Recorded audit findings, PAP conformance reviews, and resolution tracking.

docs.title: About This Documentation
docs.description: How the interactive documentation system works — fields, notes, export, and inline editing.

docs.title: Documentation Index
docs.description: Sysadmin-facing index of all broodforge documentation — designed for Control Nexus integration.
